title: Requesting new feature for subitem automation
excerpt: Can we request a new feature in subitem automation that when a subitem status changed to complete, the next subitem due date will be used or set to the parent item.

posts.author: aabatayo (Arwin Abatayo)
posts.cookedHtml: Can we request a new feature in subitem automation that when a subitem status changed to complete, the next subitem due date will be used or set to the parent item.
